title: Enrich provider assignment response with assignment evidence
description: Update the manager provider assignment endpoint so success payload includes assignment snapshot and latest timeline event while preserving deterministic auth/session and role guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Assign-provider success response exposes assignment snapshot and latest assignment timeline event
Forbidden/unauthorized/validation behavior remains deterministic for manager handoff routes
Feature tests assert the enriched contract without regressing Wave 19 and Wave 21 behavior
